tasks.title: Investigate chat button click handler and popup open logic
tasks.description: Analyze the source code files responsible for the chat button and chat popup components to identify why clicking the chat button does not open the chat popup. Check event handlers, state management, and component rendering logic related to the chat popup opening.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause of chat popup not opening on button click is identified
Relevant source files and functions responsible for chat popup open behavior are documented
tasks.expectedResult: Clear understanding of why the chat popup does not open on button click, with identified code locations for the issue

metadata.inputContext: Project source code related to chat button and chat popup components
targetArtifacts: Investigation notes on chat popup open issue
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the root cause and code locations to fix the chat popup open issue

tasks.title: Identify and document CSS bugs affecting chat popup appearance
tasks.description: Review the CSS styles applied to the chat popup component and related UI elements to find visual bugs or layout issues that affect the chat popup's display. Document the specific CSS rules or selectors causing the bugs.
acceptanceCriteria: All visible CSS bugs affecting chat popup are identified
CSS selectors and style rules causing issues are documented
tasks.expectedResult: List of CSS bugs and problematic style rules affecting chat popup UI

metadata.inputContext: Chat popup component CSS and related style files
targetArtifacts: CSS bug report for chat popup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides detailed CSS issues to be fixed for chat popup UI

tasks.title: Fix chat popup open logic in chat button click handler
tasks.description: Modify the chat button component and related state management to ensure that clicking the chat button toggles or opens the chat popup correctly. Fix event handlers, state updates, or conditional rendering as needed to restore expected popup open behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the chat button opens the chat popup as expected
Popup open state is managed correctly without errors
No regressions in other UI components
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup opens reliably on chat button click with correct state management

outputPlan.description: Fix event handler and state logic for chat popup open on button click
Ensure popup component renders correctly based on open state

metadata.inputContext: Investigation results on chat popup open logic
evidence: File diffs for ChatButton.tsx and ChatPopup.tsx
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Restores chat popup open functionality on button click

tasks.title: Fix CSS bugs in chat popup styles
tasks.description: Apply fixes to the CSS or style files affecting the chat popup component to resolve layout, positioning, visibility, or styling bugs identified. Adjust selectors, properties, or add missing styles to ensure correct popup appearance.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat popup displays correctly without visual glitches
Popup is properly positioned and styled per design
tasks.expectedResult: Chat popup CSS bugs are fixed and UI appears as intended

outputPlan.description: Fix CSS rules causing chat popup visual bugs

metadata.inputContext: CSS bug report for chat popup
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves chat popup UI by fixing CSS bugs

tasks.title: Validate chat popup open and CSS fixes with UI tests
tasks.description: Run existing unit and integration tests related to chat popup functionality and styles to verify that the fixes for popup open behavior and CSS bugs are effective and do not break other features. Add minimal UI tests if missing to cover popup open on button click.
acceptanceCriteria: All relevant tests pass without errors
Popup opens correctly in UI test scenarios
tasks.expectedResult: Test suite confirms chat popup open and CSS fixes work correctly

metadata.inputContext: Code changes for chat popup open and CSS fixes
targetArtifacts: Test results for chat popup functionality
evidence: Test output shows chat popup tests passing
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures quality and correctness of chat popup fixes
